title: İklim's And Çınar's Warden Features
description: This Mod Basiccly Adds A dimention, new mob, new tool set, new armor set, new biome and biome's blocks and wood
body: This mod add a dimension named wardens places. In this dimension everywhere sculk and this dimension have a special fluid called warden fluid.Also this mod adds warden tools and armor set.You can go this dimension with warden horn and reinforced deepslate.Warden horn drops when you kill a warden.And this mod have another fluid called sticky warden fluid.You can get it with melting warden fluid with coal.this mod adds a another mob called warden boss.You can spawn it with 4 sculks and 1 horned sculk lamp.You can get horned sculk lamp with 1 sculk lamp, 1 sticky warden fluid and 2 warden horns.And lastly you can get sculk lamp with 8 sculk and 1 jack'o lantern.this mod also adds a biome called echo fores in the echo forest you can find echo tree and some warden ore.Don't forget this mod is experimental you may encounter issues.Please report the issues for fix thanks.
